root_text.sn35.174-176:1.1: “Yo, bhikkhave, anattā, tatra vo chando pahātabbo, rāgo pahātabbo, chandarāgo pahātabbo.
root_text.sn35.174-176:1.3: Cakkhu, bhikkhave, anattā; tatra vo chando pahātabbo, rāgo pahātabbo, chandarāgo pahātabbo …pe…
root_text.sn35.174-176:1.4: jivhā anattā; tatra vo chando pahātabbo, rāgo pahātabbo, chandarāgo pahātabbo …pe…
root_text.sn35.174-176:1.5: mano anattā; tatra vo chando pahātabbo, rāgo pahātabbo, chandarāgo pahātabbo.
root_text.sn35.174-176:1.6: Yo, bhikkhave, anattā tatra vo chando pahātabbo, rāgo pahātabbo, chandarāgo pahātabbo”ti.

translation_text.sn35.174-176:0.3: Desire, Etc. for the Not-Self Interior
translation_text.sn35.174-176:1.1: “Mendicants, you should give up desire … greed … desire and greed for what is not-self.
translation_text.sn35.174-176:1.3: The eye, ear, nose, tongue, body, and mind are not-self …”
